Terms & Conditions

Last updated: January 2024

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Foaps, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement.

Use of Service

Foaps grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the platform for your restaurant operations. You may not sublicense, sell, resell, or exploit any portion of the service.

Account Responsibility

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

Termination

We may terminate or suspend your account at any time if you breach these terms. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting us.

Contact

For questions about these terms, contact us at hello@foaps.co.
